title: Avalanche│雪崩
description: Snow, when unsupported, falls rather than breaking apart.│雪沒有得到支撐時會下落而不是被破壞掉。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Snow will fall without being destroyed if there is no supporting block underneath, just like in Bedrock Edition.│雪的下方沒有方塊支撐時會掉落而不會被破壞掉，同步基岩版機制。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
